top_signals.title: Senegal Arrears to Arab Development Bank Highlight Debt Woes
top_signals.summary: The Arab Bank for Economic Development in Africa told investors last week that Senegal is in arrears with the lender, people familiar with the matter said, adding to signs of mounting financial strain on the government. The nation’s dollar bonds fell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: WHO worried about ’scale and speed’ of deadly Ebola outbreak
top_signals.summary: The WHO has declared the surge of the highly contagious hemorrhagic fever an international health emergency.
